choose_the_ancient.second_round.dialogue: You must know my offerings.
Here's a quick peek.
I've never met {SuppressedAncientId} before.
Give me a chance. I'm new to the Spire.
These trinkets toppled the Spire a millennium ago.
My wares have withstood the test of time.
One day I hope to add {SuppressedAncientId} offerings to my collection.
But Orobas brings so many great gifts?
You will get so strong.
Why doesn't {SuppressedAncientId} want to be friends?
Take a piece of me so I can go back to sleep.
zzzzzzzzzzzzz...
Why did you wake me up, {SuppressedAncientId}?
You could burn so bright with these.
The flame reveals all.
I'm wouldn't follow {SuppressedAncientId} blindly.
What's not to like.
It's rude not to acceept an offer from someone like me.
Even {SuppressedAncientId} couldn't match this offer.
Come on, let's fight.
Who will win.
It's me vs {SuppressedAncientId}.
Let's cut a deal.
This is what I have. Take it.
I never trusted that {SuppressedAncientId} myself.
I will always offer you my assistance.
We have been together for a millennium.
Don't worry. I know {SuppressedAncientId} will also help you.
